members.name: GetParam
members.summary: Returns the value of the given parameter.

members.name: SetParam
members.signature: public void SetParam(int param, float value)
members.summary: Assigns [param value] to the given parameter.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping of the rotation when the limit is surpassed. A lower damping value allows a rotation initiated by body A to travel to body B slower.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit/lower_angle
rawMembers.summary: The lower limit of rotation in the slider.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution of the rotation when the limit is surpassed. Does not affect damping.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the all rotation once the limit is surpassed. Makes all rotation slower when between 0 and 1.

rawMembers.name: angular_limit/upper_angle
rawMembers.summary: The upper limit of rotation in the slider.

rawMembers.name: angular_motion/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping of the rotation in the limits.

rawMembers.name: angular_motion/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution of the rotation in the limits.

rawMembers.name: angular_motion/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the all rotation in the limits.

rawMembers.name: angular_ortho/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping of the rotation across axes orthogonal to the slider.

rawMembers.name: angular_ortho/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution of the rotation across axes orthogonal to the slider.

rawMembers.name: angular_ortho/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the all rotation across axes orthogonal to the slider.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping that happens once the limit defined by [member linear_limit/lower_distance] and [member linear_limit/upper_distance] is surpassed.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit/lower_distance
rawMembers.summary: The minimum difference between the pivot points on their X axis before damping happens.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution once the limits are surpassed. The lower, the more velocity-energy gets lost.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the movement across the slider axis once the limits get surpassed. The lower, the slower the movement.

rawMembers.name: linear_limit/upper_distance
rawMembers.summary: The maximum difference between the pivot points on their X axis before damping happens.

rawMembers.name: linear_motion/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping inside the slider limits.

rawMembers.name: linear_motion/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution inside the slider limits.

rawMembers.name: linear_motion/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the movement across the slider axis as long as the slider is in the limits. The lower, the slower the movement.

rawMembers.name: linear_ortho/damping
rawMembers.summary: The amount of damping when movement is across axes orthogonal to the slider.

rawMembers.name: linear_ortho/restitution
rawMembers.summary: The amount of restitution when movement is across axes orthogonal to the slider.

rawMembers.name: linear_ortho/softness
rawMembers.summary: A factor applied to the movement across axes orthogonal to the slider.
